    I'M NEW

    Living Savior's Mission is to know the love of Christ and serve God so that the Holy Spirit may work through us to bring others to Christ.

    Preschool

    We believe that Living Savior Preschool can expand the child's perception of God, of other people, and of the physical world in which God has placed us.

Living Savior Lutheran Church is a Christian community of the Lutheran Church - Missouri Synod.

We believe

That God’s love is shown in the life, death, and resurrection of his Son, Jesus Christ.
That God offers a free gift of eternal life to all to believe in Jesus Christ.
That the gift is given to all who receive it through the Holy Spirit.
That we gather for worship, study, fellowship and service as a response to God’s love for us.

At A Glance

We are glad you are with us today! Visitors are welcome and asked to sign the Guest Register and Welcome Book in the Narthex through the main entrance.

Worship Services: Every Sunday Morning at 8:30 AM and 11:00 AM

Sunday School: Children, youth and adult Bible classes every Sunday at 9:45 AM

Located At: 5500 Ox Road, Fairfax Station, VA 22039 (Directions)

Announcements

4/09

April 2019 Newsletter is Available!

4/09

April 7th Bulletin

2/15

LSLC is raising money to help Puerto Rico recover from the devastation of Hurricane Maria. Read More!

Monica Rizzio to perform at LSLC May 18

In Cape Cod, someone who moves there but was not born there is a "Washashore." Young Monica barrel-raced on a Texas ranch but had never seen an ocean. So when she crossed the bridges to Cape Cod in 2004, she instantly became the "Washashore Cowgirl" - also the title of her first album, nominated for best new country artist of the year. Monica has shared the stage with Chris Botti, Boz Scaggs, Diana Krall, Joan Osborne, and Slaid Cleaves this past year. She has played the Main Stage at Strawberry Park Bluegrass festival the last two years and often collaborates with the Cape Cod Symphony Orchestra. In December 2014, she performed with Tom Rush’s band at his annual Boston Symphony Hall show. Living Savior is indeed fortunate to host Monica again this year for a free concert open to the public at 6:00 on Saturday, May 18. Please join us for this free, family friendly event!"

For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life. (John 3:16)
